CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Continued To Feb-10-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Luis Molina of Law Offices of Luis G. Molina telephone number 415-647-6003 for Plaintiff.
Fernando Pineda appeared Propria Persona.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FERNANDO PINEDA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant fails to demonstrate mistake, inadvertence, or excusable neglect. Defendant declares that he believed that he could appear on 3/6/15 and argue his case before the court. That belief was unreasonable as there were no court hearings scheduled on that day. In addition, defendant fails to demonstrate that he filed this motion "within a reasonable time" after entry of the default as required by CCP 473. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/EHG)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Continued To Nov-18-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FERNANDO PINEDA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST FERNANDO PINEDA is continued to November 18, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
